title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence
learningObjectives: Understand the fundamentals of Artificial Intelligence
Differentiate between Narrow AI, General AI and Super AI
Understand how AI learns from data
Analyze the impact of AI on society and industries

sections.title: What is Artificial Intelligence?
sections.content: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is a branch of computer science that enables machines to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. These tasks include learning, reasoning, problem-solving, understanding language, recognizing images, and making decisions. Unlike traditional software that follows predefined rules, AI systems learn patterns from data and improve their performance over time.

realWorldExample.title: Image Recognition
realWorldExample.description: Instead of programming every rule to identify a cat, an AI model learns from thousands of cat images and automatically identifies patterns that distinguish cats from other animals.

activity.title: Think-Pair-Share
activity.description: Identify three applications on your smartphone that use AI and explain how they work.

sections.title: Why is AI Important?
sections.content: AI helps organizations automate repetitive tasks, analyze massive amounts of data, improve decision-making, and create personalized experiences for users. Industries such as healthcare, finance, education, transportation, and entertainment rely heavily on AI to improve efficiency and innovation.
sections.example: Netflix recommends movies based on your viewing history using AI algorithms.

applications.name: AI Assistants
applications.description: Virtual assistants understand natural language and help users perform tasks.

applications.name: Self-Driving Cars
applications.description: AI enables vehicles to detect roads, signs, and obstacles to drive safely.

applications.name: Recommendation Systems
applications.description: AI recommends products, movies, music, and videos based on user preferences.

applications.name: Face Recognition
applications.description: AI identifies individuals using facial features.

applications.name: Medical Diagnosis
applications.description: AI analyzes medical images and patient records to assist doctors.

applications.name: Fraud Detection
applications.description: AI detects suspicious financial transactions and prevents fraud.

types.name: Narrow AI
types.description: Designed to perform specific tasks and currently the most common form of AI.

types.name: General AI
types.description: AI capable of performing any intellectual task that humans can perform.

types.name: Super AI
types.description: AI that surpasses human intelligence in all domains.

questions.question: What is the primary goal of Artificial Intelligence?
AI is a branch of which field?
Which of the following is an example of AI?
Which AI application is used by Netflix?
Which industry commonly uses AI for fraud detection?
Which of the following is Narrow AI?
Which type of AI currently exists?
Which AI application helps doctors analyze medical images?
Which company uses AI recommendations for videos?

keyTakeaways: AI enables machines to mimic human intelligence
AI learns from data rather than fixed rules
AI is used in healthcare, finance, transportation, and entertainment
Most AI today is Narrow AI
General AI and Super AI are still theoretical concepts
